data.title: test-audit-skill-resolution.sh fails with CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT unbound variable
data.description:
## Symptom
`bash tests/plugin/test-audit-skill-resolution.sh` fails with:
```
/home/user/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/scripts/audit-skill-resolution.sh: line 34: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT: unbound variable
```
Section C (--verbose flag shows per-command output) fails; 4 of 6 assertions fail as a result.

## Reproduction
- Run `bash tests/plugin/test-audit-skill-resolution.sh` without exporting `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT`.
- Pre-existing — not introduced by the current uncommitted change; fails on the pre-change tree.

## Root cause hypothesis
`plugins/dso/scripts/audit-skill-resolution.sh` at line 34 references `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}` without a fallback or default-substitution (`:-` form), and the script uses `set -u` (strict mode) so unset variable access aborts.

## Fix direction
Apply the `_PLUGIN_ROOT` resolution pattern (described in CLAUDE.md: 'Plugin path pattern') — derive the root from `BASH_SOURCE` so the script works without the env var being pre-set.

## Acceptance
`bash tests/plugin/test-audit-skill-resolution.sh` exits 0 with all sections passing, from a shell where `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` is unset.
